ddls:
CREATE TABLE "storms" (
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storm event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the storm event */,
  "map" TEXT /* Map or chart reference (if available) */,
  "number_of_tropical_storms" INTEGER /* Number of tropical storms in the year */,
  "number_of_hurricanes" INTEGER /* Number of hurricanes in the year */,
  "number_of_major_hurricanes" INTEGER /* Number of major hurricanes in the year */,
  "deaths" TEXT /* Number of deaths caused by the storms */,
  "damage_usd" TEXT /* Estimated economic damage in US dollars */,
  "strongest_storm" TEXT /* Name of the strongest storm of the year */,
  "major_landfall_hurricanes" TEXT /* Details of major landfall hurricanes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the storm event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the storm event */,
  "storm_type" TEXT /* Type of storm (e.g., tropical, subtropical, extratropical) */,
  "basin" TEXT /* Basin where the storm occurred (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hurricanes" (
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hurricane */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm event the hurricane belongs to */,
  "hurricane_name" TEXT /* Name of the hurricane */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the hurricane (e.g., cat 4, cat 5) */,
  "landfall_locations" TEXT /* Locations where the hurricane made landfall */,
  "deaths" TEXT /* Number of deaths caused by the hurricane */,
  "damage_usd" TEXT /* Estimated economic damage in US dollars */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "central_pressure" TEXT /* Central pressure of the hurricane in millibars */,
  "max_winds" TEXT /* Maximum winds of the hurricane in miles per hour */,
  "storm_surge" TEXT /* Storm surge of the hurricane in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hurricane_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hurricanes_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "landfall_locations" (
  "landfall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each landfall location */,
  "hurricane_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hurricane the landfall location belongs to */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location where the hurricane made landfall */,
  "landfall_date" TEXT /* Date of the landfall */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact at the landfall location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the landfall location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the landfall location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("landfall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_landfall_locations_hurricane_id FOREIGN KEY ("hurricane_id") REFERENCES hurricanes ("hurricane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact event */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm event the impact belongs to */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., wind, rain, flooding) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact */,
  "impact_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the impact (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "affected_population" INTEGER /* Number of people affected by the impact */,
  "economic_loss" TEXT /* Economic loss due to the impact in US dollars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_impact_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm event the note belongs to */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date the note was recorded */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or observation */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_notes_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password for secure storage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm event the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storm_versions_storm_id FOREIGN KEY ("storm_id") REFERENCES storms ("storm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "basins" (
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each basin */,
  "basin_name" TEXT /* Name of the basin */,
  "basin_description" TEXT /* Description of the basin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storm_basins" (
  "storm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the storm event */,
  "basin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the basin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storm_id", "basin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
